seo.title: Website + Business Portal | Vantus Systems
seo.meta_description: When the real problem is not just the website but the workflow behind it, this package moves you from public presence into operational software.

hero.headline: Website + Business Portal
hero.subheadline: When the real problem is not just the website but the workflow behind it, this package moves you from public presence into operational software.

sections.heading: Best for
sections.body: Businesses whose operations are already breaking on spreadsheets and manual handoffs.

sections.heading: What changes after launch
sections.body: You stop forcing operational work through channels that were never designed for it. Sensitive actions can be logged. Roles become cleaner. Manual bottlenecks become visible. And the website starts pulling real operational weight instead of only functioning as a brochure.

sections.heading: What this offer does not include by default
items: Ongoing helpdesk support inside project scope

sections.heading: Common add-ons and next moves
sections.body: Portal work is MVP-scoped by design. From here, the next move is usually deeper integration, harder security controls, or a larger enterprise systems program.

items.q: Is this too much for a small business?
items.a: Sometimes yes. That is why the public offer ladder starts lower. This package is right only when operational process debt is already material.

items.q: Are portals included as an unlimited feature?
items.a: No. The public guardrail is one primary workflow in MVP form. Additional workflows require separate scope.

items.q: Can this integrate with our existing systems?
items.a: Yes, but integration depth affects complexity and price. That is why integrations are modular.

sections.heading: When the workflow is the problem, a prettier homepage is not enough
